summary: Applied ADR 0196 from an isolated latest-main worktree, converged the Netdata parent-plus-children realtime metrics service, published `realtime.lv3.org` behind the shared Keycloak-backed edge, and verified Prometheus ingestion plus Uptime Kuma monitor management end to end.

verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest --with jsonschema python -m pytest tests/test_generate_platform_vars.py tests/test_subdomain_catalog.py tests/test_validate_service_catalog.py tests/test_nginx_edge_publication_role.py tests/test_monitoring_vm_role.py tests/test_netdata_runtime_role.py tests/test_realtime_playbook.py -q` passed with `42 passed`, `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/validate_repository_data_models.py --validate` plus `./scripts/validate_repo.sh health-probes alert-rules agent-standards` passed, and the new workflow governance surfaces answered cleanly through `make syntax-check-realtime` plus `make workflow-info WORKFLOW=converge-realtime`.

verification.check: Realtime syntax and governed live apply
verification.observed: `make live-apply-service service=realtime env=production EXTRA_ARGS='-e bypass_promotion=true'` completed successfully after adding fresh-worktree portal generation, Debian 13 Netdata repository bootstrap, and the monitoring scrape-role replay to the realtime path. The dedicated wrapper `HETZNER_DNS_API_TOKEN=... make converge-realtime env=production` then replayed successfully with `monitoring-lv3 : ok=185 changed=9 failed=0`, `nginx-lv3 : ok=100 changed=3 failed=0`, `proxmox_florin : ok=55 changed=0 failed=0`, `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=26 changed=2 failed=0`, and `postgres-lv3 : ok=24 changed=0 failed=0`.

The query `netdata_info{job="netdata"}` on `monitoring-lv3` returned five series for the realtime topology, covering `monitoring-lv3`, `docker-runtime-lv3`, `postgres-lv3`, `nginx-lv3`, and the Proxmox-host-exported parent instance.

verification.check: Public DNS and authenticated edge route
verification.observed: `dig +short realtime.lv3.org` returned `65.108.75.123`, the rerun of `make provision-subdomain FQDN=realtime.lv3.org env=production` completed cleanly, and `curl -skI https://realtime.lv3.org/` returned `HTTP/2 302` redirecting unauthenticated browsers to `/oauth2/sign_in`.

`make uptime-kuma-manage ACTION=bootstrap UPTIME_KUMA_ARGS='--base-url https://uptime.lv3.org'` created the `Realtime Metrics Private` monitor, and `make uptime-kuma-manage ACTION=ensure-monitors` reran successfully from the parallel worktree using the shared durable auth file.

notes: The first governed `make provision-subdomain FQDN=realtime.lv3.org env=production` attempt failed inside the Hetzner record-creation task while `no_log` was enabled, even though zone lookup and API authentication succeeded.

A direct Hetzner DNS API POST using the same token sourced from `nginx-lv3` created the missing `realtime` A record. The governed playbook was rerun immediately afterward and completed cleanly, including expansion of the shared Let's Encrypt certificate for `realtime.lv3.org`.

Protected integration files intentionally remain for merge-to-main: `VERSION`, the release sections in `changelog.md`, the top-level `README.md` integrated status summary, and `versions/stack.yaml` receipt mappings.
